name: BRAND HOUSE COLLECTIVE, INC.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness General We are a specialty retailer of home dcor and furnishings in the United States. As of February 1, 2025, we operated a total of 317 stores in 35 states as well as an e-commerce website, www.kirklands.com, under the Kirklands Home brand. We were founded in 1966, and our current parent corporation, Kirklands, Inc., was incorporated in 1981.
